name: RPlog_Starker_Keep_s_New_Gardener
title: Tending Roots at Starker Keep
summary: In the neglected garden ward of Starker Keep on Caspar, the Jedi Jessalyn Valios kneels among pots and seedlings, muddy and content, half-jokingly addressing the local warren mice. The keep's lord, Basca Starker, finds her there and brings cold juice, teasing her about talking to rodents before the conversation turns serious. As Jessalyn proposes planting fruit trees and suggests hiring a gardener for her frequent absences, Basca probes gently into her life, drawing out that she has two Jedi children, Kiri and Sabine, currently in the care of her friend Johanna. Basca voices concern about leaving them with a zealot allied to a Sith alchemist, sparking Jessalyn's irritation but also coaxing her deepest fear into the open: that in the coming conflict she might herself fall to the dark side, as her former husband and Master Aurejin once did. Basca offers to learn to fight and stand with her, reassures her, and pledges that her children are welcome at the keep, leaving Jessalyn comforted by the possibility of walking between dark and light together.
